ABOUT.title: About Me
ABOUT.full_about: Senior Frontend Engineer with a focus on architecture, observability, and high-velocity reliability. I specialize in taking full ownership of complex frontend systems, bridging the gap between design and production-ready code. Based in Japan, I work effectively across any timezone with a product-first mindset and a commitment to developer excellence. Fluent in Japanese (JLPT N1).

EXPERIENCES.title: Experiences
EXPERIENCES.scroll_hint: Scroll down to step through each role

interac.name: Assistant Language Teacher
interac.description: As an ALT (Assistant Language Teacher) at Interac, I taught English to Japanese students in public schools. This was the starting point of my life in Japan and my Japanese language journey.

rapptr.name: Frontend Engineer
rapptr.quote: From app strategy, design and development to launch and ongoing tailored support, we are with you every step of the way – continuously refining and evolving your product.
rapptr.description:
Product agency building web and mobile products for early-stage and growth-stage startups.

- Cut feature scaffolding time by ~50% with a Figma-synchronised design system. Designed and shipped 20+ primitives adopted across teams, eliminating the recurring cost of design-development drift on every new feature.

- Solved cross-origin isolation to ship an embeddable third-party widget. Led the full technical design, cross-origin isolation strategy, and production rollout.

sellfire.name: Senior Frontend Engineer
sellfire.quote: Sellfire is an all-in-one sales platform for inside sales teams. It offers all the necessary features in one software, including dial functions, real-time reporting, coaching and development, pipeline management, and automated lead management. Sellfire supports team scaling while improving sales performance. With real-time call coaching and report display, it quickly identifies and improves sales opportunities. By using Sellfire, sales teams can operate efficiently and effectively, accelerating business growth.
sellfire.description:
Sole senior frontend engineer, 10-repo multi-product codebase.

- Built observability from zero. Designed and shipped a Sentry + PagerDuty detection and routing layer that cut MTTR from days/weeks to minutes, transferring ownership of many production issues from customers to engineering.

- Replaced weekly manual QA with automated feedback in under 15 minutes. Architected CI/CD quality gates using GitHub Actions and Playwright E2E triggered on every staging deployment, catching regressions before they reached production.

- Led React 16 → 18 migration including updating six core libraries. Eliminated legacy build tooling, reduced bundle size, and cut load times measurably. Received unsolicited customer feedback: "It's much faster. No lag at all."

- Introduced Gitflow and async-first review norms across all primary repositories, reducing cycle time and enabling teammates across timezones to ship independently without waiting on synchronous coordination.

AI_FLASHCARDS.name: Infinite Flashcards
AI_FLASHCARDS.description:
This project is a Python script that generates Anki flashcards from a word list using OpenAI. 
 The generated cards include word readings, example sentences, and basic definitions. 
 This Python script significantly simplifies the process of creating new cards, allowing learners to focus on studying rather than card creation.
AI_FLASHCARDS.shortDescription: Generate Anki flashcards from a word list or essay using OpenAI.
